subject: fix(import): resolve 6 import/export inconsistencies with conventions guide
body:
- Make `connections` array optional in validator — nodes-only imports
  no longer fail with a cryptic error (default to empty array)
- Fix untitled arc dedup collision: include labels in arc matching key
  when title is absent, preventing distinct untitled relationships
  between the same nodes from silently collapsing
- Use consistent normalizeTitle (with whitespace collapse) in
  buildImportWarnings to match mergeService behavior, eliminating
  false-positive "unresolved endpoint" warnings for titles with
  extra internal whitespace
- Strip internal fields (id, workspaceId, viewData, createdBy) from
  export output so exported JSON matches the conventions format and
  doesn't leak storage details across workspaces
- Document connection `content` field in conventions
- Document `tags` as accepted alias for `labels` in conventions
- Update conventions to mark connection `title` as required (was
  "optional but recommended") since dedup depends on it

Tags: import, export, conventions, merge, dedup, consistency
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: import-export
Semver: minor
